issues: V4 found MORE latin tokens (31) than Schmeh hints (16)

latin_tokens.text: TIME FOR THE TRUTH

graphics.description: Horizontaler Bruchstrich (Fraktionsbalken), trennt Zähler und Nenner, erstreckt sich über die volle Zeilenbreite

latin_tokens.text: OVER MANY THOUSAND YEARS WE SEND YOU MESSENGERS AND TEACHER

glyphs.vision_description: Multiplikationszeichen (kursives x) zwischen 3 und 17 im Zähler

latin_tokens.text: ALL THIS KNOWLEDGE BEHIND YOUR CIVILISATION IS OURS

graphics.description: Horizontaler Bruchstrich, der Zähler und Nenner trennt

latin_tokens.text: WE ARE THE DESIGNERS OF MANY CIVILISATIONS

graphics.description: Vinculum (Bruchstrich) — durchgezogene horizontale Linie, die Zähler und Nenner trennt

latin_tokens.text: YOUR CIVILISATION IS ONE OF MANY BILLION CIVILISATIONS

graphics.description: Bruchstrich (durchgehende horizontale Linie zwischen Zähler und Nenner)

latin_tokens.text: THE MANKIND IS DESIGNED TO RECIEVE OUR THOUGHT

glyphs.vision_description: Lowercase 'x' used as multiplication operator (top row, first)

latin_tokens.text: SOME GENIUS IDEA YOU HAVE ARE OURS

graphics.description: Solid black horizontal fraction bar spanning the full width between numerator and denominator

latin_tokens.text: WE CAN HEAR YOUR THOUGHT
WE KNOW YOUR NEEDS

glyphs.vision_description: Hochgestellte 2 (Exponent) auf der führenden 2 des Zählers

latin_tokens.text: WE CAN LET YOU SEE THINGS

graphics.description: Bruchstrich (horizontale Linie) zwischen Zähler und Nenner, durchgehend von links nach rechts

latin_tokens.text: WE CAN LET YOU MAKE THINGS
WE CAN GIVE YOU THOUGHTS

graphics.description: Long horizontal line spanning nearly the full line width, positioned between the two numeric rows, serving as a fraction/vinculum separator.

latin_tokens.text: WE CALL SOME OF THE CHOSEN ONES THE MESSENGERS

graphics.description: Unförmiger schwarzer Tintenfleck, oval/elliptisch, leicht nach links oben geneigt, mit unscharfem Rand und leichter Satinierung am unteren Rand

latin_tokens.text: THIS MESSENGERS ARE OUR REPRESENTATIVES

glyphs.vision_description: Tall vertical filled black glyph with a curled/crowned top element (resembling a hat or flame), elongated columnar body containing two small white circular voids, and two short leg-like protrusions at the bottom. Organic, irregular silhouette.

latin_tokens.text: WE SEND YOU OUR WORD AND KNOWLEDGE OVER THIS MESSENGERS

graphics.description: Continuous irregular black contour forming a stylized figure; no decorative lines or arcs beyond the silhouette itself.

regions.description: Schmeh 2017 vollständige lateinische Sätze (1 lines, joined)
